changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create sync function and trigger: module_event_crf → event_crf
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_event_crf_to_event_crf() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO event_crf ( event_crf_id, study_event_id, study_subject_id, crf_version_id, status_id, date_interviewed, interviewer_name, annotations, date_completed, validator_id, date_validate, date_validate_completed, validator_annotations, date_created, date_updated, owner_id, update_id, electronic_signature_status, sdv_status, old_status_id, sdv_update_id ) VALUES ( NEW.event_crf_id, NEW.study_event_id, NEW.study_subject_id, NEW.crf_version_id, NEW.status_id, NEW.date_interviewed, NEW.interviewer_name, NEW.annotations, NEW.date_completed, NEW.validator_id, NEW.date_validate, NEW.date_validate_completed, NEW.validator_annotations, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.owner_id, NEW.update_id, NEW.electronic_signature_status, NEW.sdv_status, NEW.old_status_id, NEW.sdv_update_id ); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE event_crf SET study_event_id = NEW.study_event_id, study_subject_id = NEW.study_subject_id, crf_version_id = NEW.crf_version_id, status_id = NEW.status_id, date_interviewed = NEW.date_interviewed, interviewer_name = NEW.interviewer_name, annotations = NEW.annotations, date_completed = NEW.date_completed, validator_id = NEW.validator_id, date_validate = NEW.date_validate, date_validate_completed = NEW.date_validate_completed, validator_annotations = NEW.validator_annotations, date_created = NEW.date_created, date_updated = NEW.date_updated, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, update_id = NEW.update_id, electronic_signature_status = NEW.electronic_signature_status, sdv_status = NEW.sdv_status, old_status_id = NEW.old_status_id, sdv_update_id = NEW.sdv_update_id WHERE event_crf_id = OLD.event_crf_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM event_crf WHERE event_crf_id = OLD.event_crf_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_module_event_crf AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON module_event_crf FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_module_event_crf_to_event_crf();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_module_event_crf ON module_event_crf; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_module_event_crf_to_event_crf();
